0.q: Overexpression of VcGolS3 in transgenic Arabidopsis conferred tolerance to salt and drought stresses, primarily evidenced by a significant increase in GolS enzyme activity and reduced ROS accumulation.

1.q: The key gene galactinol synthase (GolS) VcGolS, the first catalytic enzyme in the Raffinose family oligosaccharides synthesis pathway, was further analyzed to explore its function to confer abiotic tolerance in transgenic Arabidopsis.
